settings.title: Can you use tallow balm on both face and body?
settings.text: Yes. Our tallow balms are formulated for both face and body use. The fatty acid profile of grass-fed tallow closely matches your skin's natural sebum, making it effective and gentle across all skin types and areas of the body -- including the face, hands, elbows, and any areas of dryness or sensitivity.

settings.title: Is tallow balm safe for sensitive skin?
settings.text: Tallow balm is one of the most skin-compatible moisturizers available for sensitive skin. It contains no synthetic fragrances, no parabens, no preservatives, and no petroleum derivatives. Many customers with eczema, rosacea, psoriasis, and reactive skin find it gentler than conventional moisturizers precisely because it contains no synthetic additives that commonly trigger reactions.

settings.title: Where does your tallow come from?
settings.text: We source 100% grass-fed beef tallow from our own family farm in Idaho. It is processed in small batches to preserve its natural nutrient profile, including fat-soluble vitamins A, D, E, and K. We do not use commodity tallow or source from outside our own farm.

settings.title: How long does one jar of tallow balm last?
settings.text: Most customers get 2-3 months of daily use from a single jar. Because tallow is a concentrated formula with no water content, a small amount goes a long way -- you need significantly less than a typical water-based moisturizer to cover the same area.

settings.title: What makes your tallow balm different from a regular moisturizer?
settings.text: Regular moisturizers often rely on water, emulsifiers, synthetic preservatives, and fillers. Tallow balm is concentrated, deeply nourishing care made with ingredients your skin can recognize and use.
